name: Belarusian Congress of Democratic Trade Unions
Belarussian Republican Union of Consumer Societies (BELKOOPSOYUZ)
description: BELKOOPSOYUZ is a union of co-operatives. They purchase agricultural products and raw materials from individuals, then processes and packages those materials, then sells them through consumer co-operatives (retail stores) to their consumer members. They currently have about 700,000 individual members, providee employment for more than 86,000 people, and serve 3.5 million people, or 36.6% of the population (from their website April 2014).
